summary: Round 1 security contract published. Defines 6 files (encryption.ts, rateLimiter.ts, auditLogger.ts, securityHeaders.ts, sanitize.ts, index.ts) with complete type signatures, 6 rate limit tiers (ip 100/min, tenant 1000/min, user 60/min, webhook 100/min, aiCall 50/min, login 5/15min), PII encryption specification (phone in leads/users, whatsapp_number in tenants, bank_details/PAN/Aadhaar), and security headers configuration.
